devnet_stability.highlight: Finality achieved with ≤2 subnets; fails consistently at 4 subnets with 64 validators
P95 aggregation time is 4 seconds across clients; slot interval is only 0.8 seconds
DevNet 4/5 branch is 3x slower than main branch due to conservative XMSS parameters
8-core aggregator hardware insufficient; 16-core minimum recommended pending formal benchmarks

spec_updates.highlight: DevNet 5 PR merged: single proof posted per block on-chain
discv5 discovery code removed from lean spec as unnecessary for minimal client

el_cl_integration.highlight: Lambda demonstrated working EL+CL integration via engine API; running at slot 10,000 with ethrex, Nethermind, Geth, Erigon, Nimbus, Besu
ethereum-package fork (PR #19) adds lean client support; public devnet available

action_items.action: Upstream aggregate coverage and proposer aggregation metrics to lean spec
Open PR to lean spec with improved block-building algorithm

decisions.decision: Spec stabilization phase begins; no major new features to be added to lean spec now
Stay on conservative XMSS branch for now; revisit main branch only if performance is an absolute blocker

targets.target: 1–2 months: lean spec ready for broader review by consensus client teams and EF researchers
